validation_queries.description: Check if 'timer sampling' exists in string entries
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%timer_sampling%';
validation_queries.error_message: 'timer sampling' string not found in rocpd_string

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string IS NULL OR TRIM(string) = '';
validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL string entries found in view_rocpd_string

validation_queries.description: Check count of rows with name_id = 15 exceeds 1000
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_region WHERE name_id = 15;
validation_queries.error_message: Insufficient rows with name_id = 15 in rocpd_region

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_region WHERE start < 0 OR end < 0;
validation_queries.error_message: Negative values found in start or end timestamps

validation_queries.description: Check duration consistency (start should be < end)
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_region WHERE end < start;
validation_queries.error_message: Region duration invalid: end time before start time
